texto: The boy I once was is a stranger to me, and sometimes I wonder if terrible experiences are enough to change a person - I mean fundamentally to change a person's nature - or if they merely subdue it, and it endures there beneath, and will reassert itself in time. I wonder if I will be recognized by my family. If those I love will still know me.
explicacao: Citação de Peter Hobbs sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “The boy I once was is a stranger to me, and sometimes I wonder if terrible experiences are enough…” articula familia, change-your-life, qualities-of-life em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e termino.
